common difference will still be constant.

Q26 MCQ Not checked
Technical • CHEMICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Which of the following options is close in meaning to the word below?
PELLUCID

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
Pellucid: Crystal clear
Logistical: Relating to or involving organization and planning.
Incomprehensible: Not able to be understand.
Vagrant: A person without a settled home or who wanders from place to place and lives by begging.

Q31 MSQ Not checked
Technical • CHEMICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Which of the following statements is correct grammatically?

Correct answer: C, A, B
Solution

(c)
Option (c) is the only option which is grammatically correct.
In sentences involving the use of time clause like “when”, future tense cannot be used. In the
given options, option (a) and (b) are ruled out. We can say that “If you drive, I will not accompany
you”. While using ‘as’ and ‘like’, the correct usage is “He plays like his father” or “He plays as his
father does”.

Q33 MCQ Not checked
Technical • CHEMICAL ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

Fill in the blanks with most appropriate pair of words so as to make a logically meaningful sentence.
Because Karishma’s parents often ______ their plans as soon as they were formed, she assumed that all adults were as ______ as her parents.

Correct answer: C
Solution

(c)
The word ‘mercurial’ means ‘quickly changeable’. In the given statement, missing word in the second
part of the sentence will indicate the characteristics of a person who changes his/her plans very often.
